pysnap.runtime package¶

Runtime helpers for PySnap.

Submodules¶

pysnap.runtime.sessions module¶

Persistent session registry used by terminal connections.

class pysnap.runtime.sessions.SessionRecord(vm_name, serial_port, pid, attached_at)[source]¶

Bases: object

Represent one live terminal session.

Parameters:

  • vm_name (str)

  • serial_port (int)

  • pid (int)

  • attached_at (str)

vm_name: str¶
serial_port: int¶
pid: int¶
attached_at: str¶
class pysnap.runtime.sessions.SessionRegistry(root_dir=None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Store terminal session metadata in a temp-directory registry.

Parameters:

root_dir (Path | None)

list_live_sessions()[source]¶

Return live session records keyed by VM name.

Returns:

Live session records.

Return type:

dict[str, SessionRecord]

get_live_session(vm_name)[source]¶

Return one live session for the specified VM.

Parameters:

vm_name (str) – VM name to inspect.

Returns:

Live session record or None.

Return type:

SessionRecord | None

register(vm_name, serial_port)[source]¶

Register a session for the duration of a context manager.

Parameters:

  • vm_name (str) – VM name.

  • serial_port (int) – Attached serial TCP port.

Yields:

Persisted session record.

Return type:

Iterator[SessionRecord]
